title: Klaviyo vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo vs Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison Guide
intro: Klaviyo and Moosend are both freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands needing advanced integrations and predictive analytics, while Moosend offers better value for small businesses prioritizing affordability and unlimited sending. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your marketing strategy.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need native integrations
You want advanced features like predictive analytics and customer reviews collection
You prioritize SMS marketing capabilities alongside email
choose_b_if: You're a small business with a tight budget looking for maximum value
You need unlimited email sends and don't want to worry about message restrictions
You want to build landing pages and subscription forms with your email platform

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce businesses requiring deep platform integrations and predictive intelligence. Moosend wins for cost-conscious small businesses seeking unlimited emails and straightforward automation. Both have strong ratings (Klaviyo 4.6/5 on G2, Moosend 4.7/5), so 'better' is context-dependent.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at just $9/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Additionally, Moosend's free tier supports 1,000 subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500, making Moosend the clear choice if budget is your primary concern.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard CSV exports of your subscriber lists and email templates. However, complex automation workflows may need to be rebuilt manually. Plan your migration carefully and test campaigns after switching to ensure your marketing operations run smoothly.
